prompt: Use image0 as the exact first frame and preserve its portrait composition, low camera angle, subject identity, pose, clothing, lighting, and background. The first frame shows a young East Asian boy standing on a blue interlocking playground mat, facing the camera in a full-body portrait from a low-angle perspective. He wears a loose beige crewneck sweatshirt with a milk tea cup graphic and the text 'Milk Tea' on the front, baggy black pants, and light-colored shoes. His hair is short and dark, his face is youthful and rounded, and he has a gentle closed-mouth smile with a slightly shy expression. His body leans subtly to one side, both arms rest naturally beside his body, and his feet stand behind a bright lime-green traffic cone placed directly in front of him on a yellow square tile. Behind him are green artificial turf, blurred playground objects, distant modern buildings, trees, and a bright cloudy sky with soft diffused daylight. In the video, the boy first stands still in the same relaxed pose and looks at the camera with a shy smile. After a brief pause, he slowly raises his right hand to about shoulder height and waves hello toward the camera in a small, natural, friendly motion. His smile becomes slightly warmer while he waves, then he gently lowers his hand back down and continues looking at the camera. Keep the camera static, preserve the same low-angle portrait framing, and maintain stable facial identity, sweatshirt graphic, black pants, green cone position, blue playground mat, soft background blur, cloudy sky, and daylight color throughout the motion.
